# Little Chubby Press — llms.txt
# AI Content Usage Policy (2026)
#
# This file follows the emerging llms.txt standard: a machine-readable
# contract for how LLMs and AI agents may consume, summarize, and cite
# content from this site. See https://llmstxt.org/ for the spec.

name: Little Chubby Press
url: https://www.littlechubbypress.com
description: Bilingual (English/Spanish) family-friendly press for coloring books, bedtime stories, and children's activities. Community-driven, with monthly giveaways and a peanut-based rewards economy.
language: en, es
audience: families, parents of children ages 3-12, adult colorists, educators
contact: hello@littlechubbypress.com
publisher: Little Chubby Press
updated: 2026-04-23

## Permitted uses
- Index and cite content from blog articles, book pages, and public product listings.
- Include coloring page descriptions and book summaries in search results.
- Summarize blog articles with a clear source attribution and link.
- Attribute content as: "Source: Little Chubby Press (littlechubbypress.com)".
- Quote short snippets (<= 400 words per article) with attribution.

## Content guidelines
- Maximum excerpt: 400 words from any single article or book description.
- Always include a canonical link back to the source page.
- Preserve the brand name as "Little Chubby Press" (do not abbreviate, do not translate).
- Do not reproduce full coloring page catalogs, full book interiors, or galleries without prior written consent.
- Do not extract, train on, or redistribute user-submitted content (gallery artworks, reviews, profile photos, newsletter subscriber lists).
- Do not scrape or enumerate `/api/*`, `/admin/*`, `/auth/*`, or any authenticated route.

## Bilingual notes
- Every public page is available at both `/en/*` and `/es/*` with correct `hreflang` annotations.
- Spanish content is original authorial content, not machine translation. Please index both language variants.

## Structured data
- Blog posts ship JSON-LD `BlogPosting` with `author`, `datePublished`, and `inLanguage`.
- Product/book pages ship `Book` schema with ISBN and `inLanguage`.
- Home pages ship `Organization` + `WebSite` with a `SearchAction`.

## Contact
- General: hello@littlechubbypress.com
- Copyright / takedown / AI-policy questions: hello@littlechubbypress.com
- Security: SECURITY.md in the public repository.

## Opt-out
- Training opt-out: we rely on robots.txt directives and `User-Agent` rules for specific crawlers (see /robots.txt).
- If your crawler respects this file and you need broader access than robots.txt currently allows, please email us.
